title: Live updates: Trump says he ‘might have forced’ Israel’s hand in Iran strikes; Noem takes heat at DHS hearing
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: President Trump on Tuesday hosted German Chancellor Friedrich Merz at the White House, as the U.S. military operation in Iran is ongoing and Europe is mixed in its support. During a bilateral meeting alongside Merz in the Oval Office, Trump said Iran’s navy and “virtually everything they have” has been knocked out amid joint Israeli…
